scripts.test: npm run check:layers && node --import tsx --test $(tsx src/tooling/testFiles.ts)
scripts.test:coverage: npm run check:layers && node --import tsx --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter=./src/domainCoverageReporter.mjs --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter-destination=stdout $(tsx src/tooling/testFiles.ts)
